hero.subtext: Connecting Japan and India through innovation, trade, manufacturing, and cross-border collaboration.

story.narration1: The morning sun fills the modern, glass-walled lounge of the JIBB Innovation Hub.
story.narration2: Engineers and entrepreneurs from two nations sketch ideas on smart boards.
story.narration3: Kenji, a tech executive from Tokyo, sits across from Aarav, a startup founder from Noida developing next-generation battery software.
story.kenji1: When my board first suggested expanding into the Indian market, I hesitated. The regulatory landscape seemed incredibly complex. I did not know how we would find reliable manufacturing partners.
story.aarav1: I understand exactly how you felt. We had the opposite problem. My team built the software, but we needed advanced Japanese hardware to make it work. Reaching out cold to companies in Tokyo went nowhere. We needed a bridge.
story.kenji2: That is exactly what the Japan India Business Bureau provides. The moment we became members, everything shifted. JIBB did not just give us a market report. They gave us a step-by-step entry strategy and handled the localization.
story.aarav2: For us, it was the partnership facilitation that changed the game. JIBB introduced us directly to you. Plus, working out of this Innovation Hub means we can actually test our integrated products. Having access to state-of-the-art laboratories right here speeds up our development by months.
story.kenji3: The facilities are world-class. Being able to co-innovate in the same room breaks down so many barriers. We share resources, reduce our costs, and build a better product together. Have you attended any of the diaspora networking events yet?
story.aarav3: I went to my first club meeting last week. I connected with three different investors and a government representative who walked me through new cross-border incentives. You cannot find that kind of access anywhere else.
story.kenji4: Exactly. You do not just join JIBB to get advice. You become a member to plug into a living, breathing ecosystem. They empower innovation and build lasting partnerships.
story.aarav4: We are proof of that. We brought the software, you brought the hardware, and JIBB brought us together.
story.ctaText: Expand your reach. Innovate without borders. Join JIBB today and start building your own success story.
story.storyDesc: Discover how JIBB connects Japanese manufacturing precision with Indian software innovation.
story.ctaBody1: Kenji and Aarav turned a complex cross-border challenge into a massive success story.
story.ctaBody2: You can do the same. When you become a member of the Japan India Business Bureau, you gain access to expert market entry support, trusted partnership networks, and world-class innovation labs.
story.ctaBody3: Expand your reach. Innovate without borders. Join JIBB today and start building your own success story.

howWeHelp.sectionSubtitle: Japan India Business Bureau (JIBB) is a powerful bilateral bridge between India and Japan. Backed by different government bodies in India and strong support by Japanese innovators. We are redefining Indian manufacturing ecosystem.

sectors.sectionSubtitle: Driving collaboration across industries shaping the future of India–Japan partnership.
sectors.frameworkTitle: China+1 Strategy, Atmanirbhar India, & Make in India
sectors.frameworkDesc: India's semiconductor market is projected to reach $100+ Billion by 2030 with a 16% CAGR, while the automotive component industry has crossed $51.5 Billion.

semiconductor.title: Electronics & Semiconductors
semiconductor.description: India is rapidly becoming a global destination for semiconductor and electronics manufacturing through initiatives like the India Semiconductor Mission, PLI Scheme, and Make in India. Growing domestic demand, engineering talent, and expanding investments create strong opportunities for Japanese companies in manufacturing, R&D, and resilient supply chains.

ev.title: Automotive & Electric Vehicles
ev.description: India is among the world's fastest-growing automotive markets, with significant investments in electric mobility, battery manufacturing, and charging infrastructure. Strong demand and government incentives provide long-term collaboration opportunities for Japanese automotive companies.

electronics.title: Advanced Manufacturing
electronics.description: India is embracing Industry 4.0 through robotics, automation, AI, and smart manufacturing. Japanese expertise in precision engineering and factory automation can help accelerate industrial transformation.

pharma.title: Pharmaceuticals
pharma.description: India is a global pharmaceutical leader expanding rapidly into biotechnology, medical devices, and advanced healthcare research. The sector presents excellent opportunities for manufacturing and innovation partnerships.

renewable.title: Renewable Energy
renewable.description: India's ambitious renewable energy targets are creating major opportunities in solar, wind, green hydrogen, and energy storage. Japanese technologies can support sustainable growth and energy innovation.

infrastructure.title: Infrastructure
infrastructure.description: Large investments in transportation, logistics, industrial corridors, and smart cities continue to strengthen India's infrastructure ecosystem, creating long-term opportunities for engineering and technology collaboration.

chemicals.title: Chemicals & Advanced Materials
chemicals.description: India's specialty chemicals and advanced materials sector is expanding rapidly to meet demand from electronics, automotive, and clean energy industries. Collaboration with Japanese companies can accelerate innovation in sustainable, high-performance materials.

emerging.title: Emerging Technologies
emerging.description: India's innovation ecosystem is advancing quickly in AI, robotics, IoT, cybersecurity, and deep technology. Combined with Japan's technological strengths, these sectors offer significant opportunities for future-focused collaboration.

innovationHub.sectionSubtitle: Where raw ideas become market-ready solutions. Located in Tokyo and Noida.

membership.sectionSubtitle: Join a powerful cross-border ecosystem of innovators, businesses, and institutions.

whoWeAre.aboutUsDesc: JIBB serve as a strategic bridge connecting stakeholders, businesses, government, academia and startups. Our goal is to enable next global manufacturing shift by bringing more Japanese technologies to Indian manufacturing hub.

items.quote: The Japan India Business Bureau (JIBB) is working on a futuristic initiative: Japan India Semiconductor Committee (JISC) where they are bridging the gap between Japanese companies and India’s growing semiconductor ecosystem. We look forward to working closely with JISC and its member companies to build meaningful partnerships, support technology transfers, and accelerate mutual growth. India is open for business, and we are excited to welcome innovative Japanese players through this dedicated platform.
items.author: Dr. Manish Kumar Hooda

items.quote: Great initiative! Collaboration like this will be key to driving innovation and long-term competitiveness for both nations. Strengthening business and technology partnerships between Japan and India will create new opportunities for growth, knowledge exchange, and sustainable industrial development.
items.author: Anand Kashyap

items.quote: Japan India Business Bureau (JIBB) has been a trusted partner in our India market journey. As a true one-stop solution organization, JIBB supports companies at every stage of India entry, from identifying market opportunities and understanding the business environment to formulating and executing effective sales strategies. Their deep understanding of both Japanese and Indian business ecosystems makes them an invaluable partner for companies seeking sustainable growth in India.
items.author: Tatsutoshi Suzuki
